title: malva ononidifolia
intro: Malva ononidifolia, also known as the common mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Malva ononidifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Malva ononidifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and creams to support skin health and alleviate various health issues.
